name: Convict Gunslinger

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Nose for Loot
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model removes a marker, draw a card.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

actions.name: Bar Brawl Instincts
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Scheme or Remains marker.
actions.effects: Make a marker of the same type anywhere within 6" of its current location, then remove the target.

triggers.name: Improvised Missile
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemies within (X)1" of the made marker.

triggers.name: Crossbreeze
triggers.text: An enemy model within 3" of the made marker gains a Staggered token.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 2, indicated by 'Minion (2)' in characteristics line
